name: Booking Confirmation — Customer
subject: Your Booking is Confirmed! 🎉 — {{ doc.booking_title }}
message:
Dear {{ frappe.db.get_value('Event Customer', doc.customer, 'full_name') }},

Great news! Your booking {{ doc.name }} has been confirmed.

Event:{{ doc.booking_title }}
Vendor:{{ doc.vendor }}
Event Date:{{ doc.event_date }}
Total Amount:₹{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(doc.total_amount) }}
Advance Due:₹{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(doc.advance_amount) }}

View Booking Details

name: New Booking Request — Vendor
subject: New Booking Request for {{ doc.event_date }} — EventSphere
message:
You have received a new booking request on EventSphere.

Booking ID:{{ doc.name }}
Event Date:{{ doc.event_date }}
Event Type:{{ doc.event_type }}
Guests:{{ doc.guest_count }}
Budget:₹{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(doc.total_amount) }}

Please login to your vendor dashboard to confirm or decline this request within 24 hours.

name: Payment Received Confirmation
subject: Payment of ₹{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(doc.amount) }} Received — {{ doc.booking }}
message:
We have received your payment.

Payment ID:{{ doc.name }}
Booking:{{ doc.booking }}
Amount:₹{{ '{:,.2f}'.format(doc.amount) }}
Mode:{{ doc.payment_mode }}
Transaction ID:{{ doc.transaction_id or 'N/A' }}

name: Booking Cancellation Alert
subject: Booking Cancelled — {{ doc.booking_title }}
message:
Booking {{ doc.name }} — {{ doc.booking_title }} has been cancelled.

If you believe this is an error, please contact support immediately.

name: Vendor Profile Approved
subject: Your Vendor Profile is Now Active on EventSphere! 🎊
message:
Congratulations {{ doc.contact_person }}!

Your vendor profile {{ doc.vendor_name }} has been approved and is now live on EventSphere.

Customers can now discover and book your services. View your profile.
